author: Kuanphough
description: Sync Bangumi collection and episode progress into notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Kuanphough
manifest.description: Sync Bangumi collection and episode progress into notes.
manifest.name: bangumi

name: bangumi

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 0.2.2 Release Notes

### 中文

本版主要是同步减负、文档补全和写回体验修正。

- 优化章节进度拉取策略：默认只为书籍、动画、三次元的 `wish` / `do` / `collect` 条目拉取章节进度。
- 游戏、音乐、搁置和抛弃条目默认跳过章节进度，减少不必要的 API 请求。
- 增加看板列表缓存，并在同步目录内文件创建、删除、修改、重命名或同步目录变化时自动失效，打开看板更轻快。
- 校准模板变量文档，补充变量边界、可选数据源和中英文说明。
- 优化评价与评分写回：当前笔记 Push 和看板状态修改都能同步状态、评论与评分。
- 明确文档说明：插件只读取设置中的同步目录、开启 Daily Note 同步时的今日日记，以及手动 Push 时当前打开的笔记。

### English

This release focuses on lighter syncing, documentation polish, and write-back improvements.

- Optimized episode progress fetching: by default, progress is fetched only for `wish` / `do` / `collect` book, anime, and real-life subjects.
- Games, music, on-hold, and dropped subjects skip episode progress by default to reduce unnecessary API requests.
- Added board list caching, invalidated when files under the sync directory are created, deleted, modified, renamed, or when the sync directory changes.
- Updated the template variable documentation with clearer boundaries, optional data sources, and bilingual descriptions.
- Improved comment and rating write-back: current-note Push and board status changes can now sync status, comment, and rating.
- Documented the plugin’s file access scope: configured sync directory, today’s Daily Note when enabled, and the current note during manual Push.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 0.2.1 Release Notes

### 中文

0.2.1 是一个偏稳定性和体验修复的版本，重点改进 Bangumi 看板、章节进度同步和写回安全性。

新增与改进：

- 看板章节 Push 成功后，会自动更新本地 Markdown checklist 和 `progress_done`，不再需要手动重新同步才能看到本地变化。
- 看板支持 Bangumi 全部章节类型，包括本篇、SP、OP、ED、PV、MAD 和 Other。
- 章节现在按类型和序号排序，本篇优先显示，非本篇章节会以不同样式标注。
- 修复长篇动画章节进度只拉取前 50 条的问题，现在会分页拉取完整章节进度。
- 状态、评分、评论写回前增加更清晰的 diff 预览，降低误操作风险。
- 本地笔记索引和看板列表只扫描插件同步目录，不再先扫描整个库后过滤，提升大库性能。
- 更新模板变量文档，说明 `progress_total` 会包含已拉取到的全部有效章节类型。
- 更新 README 和 Roadmap，补充写回限制、看板行为和后续计划。


### English

0.2.1 focuses on stability, board usability, episode progress handling, and safer write-back previews.

Changes:

- After a successful board push, the local Markdown checklist and `progress_done` are updated automatically.
- The board now supports all Bangumi episode types: main episodes, SP, OP, ED, PV, MAD, and Other.
- Episodes are sorted by type and episode order, with main episodes shown first and extra types visually marked.
- Fixed long series only loading the first 50 episode progress entries. Episode progress is now fetched with pagination.
- Status, rating, and comment write-back now shows a clearer diff preview before confirmation.
- Local note indexing and board listing now scan only the configured sync directory instead of the whole vault.
- Updated template variable docs to clarify that `progress_total` includes all fetched valid episode types.
- Updated README and Roadmap with write-back limitations, board behavior, and future plans.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 0.2.0

This release is a major update from the initial 0.1.0 MVP. Bangumi is no longer only a basic collection-to-note sync tool: it now supports richer note generation, faster sync, single-subject import, Daily Notes, On Air notes, and an interactive progress board.

较大更新。Bangumi 不再只是基础的收藏同步插件，现在已经支持更丰富的笔记生成、更快的同步流程、单条目导入、每日日记、每日放送笔记，以及可交互的进度看板。

### New Features / 新功能
- Added optional extended subject data: summary, infobox, public tags, public rating, collection stats, staff, characters, and related subjects.  
  新增可选扩展数据：简介、infobox、公共标签、公共评分、收藏统计、制作人员、角色、关联条目。
- Added single-subject sync by Bangumi URL, subject ID, Chinese title, original title, or partial keyword search.  
  新增单条目同步，支持通过 Bangumi 链接、条目 ID、中文名、原名或标题片段搜索导入。
- Added Daily Notes sync block support for newly synced items.  
  新增每日日记同步块，可记录本次新增同步内容。
- Added weekly On Air note, with full list and collection-filtered list.  
  新增每周放送笔记，支持完整列表和收藏筛选列表。
- Added Bangumi-style progress board for ongoing items.  
  新增 Bangumi 风格的进行中条目进度看板。
- Added explicit write-back support for episode progress, collection status, comment, and rating.  
  新增显式写回支持，可写回章节进度、收藏状态、评论和评分。
- Added clearer sync progress notices and failure reports.  
  新增更清晰的同步进度提示和失败报告。
- Added Test token button.  
  新增 Token 测试按钮。
- Added automatic User-Agent generation based on plugin version.  
  新增基于插件版本自动生成 User-Agent。

### Improvements / 改进

- Improved sync performance by reducing unnecessary file scans and API requests.  
  减少不必要的文件扫描和 API 请求，提升同步性能。
- Added incremental sync based on last sync time.  
  新增基于上次同步时间的增量同步。
- Added missing-file recovery, so deleted local notes can be recreated.  
  新增缺失文件补回，本地误删的条目笔记可以重新生成。
- Full sync now avoids rewriting unchanged files.  
  全量同步现在会避免重复刷新没有变化的文件。
- Reduced noisy Notice messages during sync.  
  减少同步过程中的 Notice 刷屏。
- Improved frontmatter structure and kept the default template lighter.  
  优化 frontmatter 结构，默认模板更轻量。
- Added `progress_done` to frontmatter for Bases / Dataview usage.  
  在 frontmatter 中保留 `progress_done`，方便配合 Bases / Dataview 使用。
- Improved template variable documentation in both Chinese and English.  
  改进中英文模板变量文档。
- Improved settings page layout and textarea usability.  
  优化设置页布局和模板编辑框体验。
- Improved On Air rendering by hiding empty weekdays and simplifying full-list items.  
  优化每日放送渲染，隐藏空星期，并简化完整列表条目。
- Improved error messages from Bangumi API responses.  
  改进 Bangumi API 错误信息显示。
- Improved release workflow and community plugin review compatibility.  
  改进发布流程和社区插件审核兼容性。

### Safety / 安全性

- Write-back actions are explicit and require user confirmation.  
  所有写回操作都是显式触发，并需要用户确认。
- The plugin does not modify your Bangumi account in the background.  
  插件不会在后台自动修改你的 Bangumi 账号数据。
- User-written content outside generated sync blocks is preserved.  
  生成同步块之外的用户手写内容会被保留。
- Status and progress write-back are separated from normal sync behavior.  
  状态和进度写回与普通同步流程相互独立。

### Fixes / 修复

- Fixed duplicate note creation by matching existing notes through `bangumi_id`.  
  通过 `bangumi_id` 匹配已有笔记，修复重复创建问题。
- Fixed null episode data causing progress rendering errors.  
  修复空章节数据导致进度渲染报错的问题。
- Fixed access token and User-Agent handling.  
  修复 access token 和 User-Agent 处理问题。
- Fixed several Obsidian community plugin review warnings.  
  修复若干 Obsidian 社区插件审核警告。
- Fixed collection lookup issues for single-subject sync.  
  修复单条目同步时的收藏查询问题。
- Fixed Daily Notes marker detection and clearer missing-marker reminders.  
  修复每日日记标记检测，并优化缺失标记提醒。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 0.1.4

### 中文

本版本是一次功能增强与体验优化更新，新增 Bangumi 风格看板/格子 UI，扩展双向写回能力，并对同步性能、模板数据源和每日放送等功能做了改进。

#### 新增

- 新增 **Bangumi 看板**：集中查看 `status: do` 的进行中条目。
- 新增**每日放送**笔记：可生成本周 Bangumi 放送列表，并筛选自己的想看/进行中动画收藏。
- 新增**单条目**搜索同步：支持输入 Bangumi 链接、subject ID、中文名、原名或标题关键词。
- 新增**模板数据开关**：可选拉取详细条目信息、Staff、Characters 和 Relations。
- 默认模板正文新增条目简介 `Summary`。
- 新增 frontmatter 轻量进度字段 `progress_done`，方便配合 Obsidian Base 使用。
- 新增**显式写回**命令，可从当前条目笔记 Push 章节 checklist 和收藏状态到 Bangumi。

#### 改进

- 同步性能优化：减少不必要的 Markdown 扫描和重复 API 请求。
- 重构 Bangumi API client 相关代码，提高请求、重试和错误处理的稳定性。
- 增量同步会补回本地误删的条目文件。
- 全量同步时，如果渲染结果没有变化，不再刷新本地文件。
- 同步 Notice 减少刷屏，只保留开始、分组进度和结束摘要。
- 同步失败报告更清晰；章节进度未拉取时会明确显示“没拉到进度内容”。
- 写回成功后会重新拉取远端数据校验结果，避免“请求成功但实际未写入”的假成功。
- 写回接口现在能正确处理 Bangumi 返回空响应的情况。
- 写回提示改为显示最终状态，不再显示 `status changed: no` 这类不直观文本。
- 状态写回成功后会更新本地笔记 frontmatter；如果使用分类存储，也会自动移动笔记到对应状态目录。
- 设置页优化了模板编辑区域和模板变量文档入口。
- README / README-en 更新了安装方式、看板说明、截图和写回说明。

#### 说明

- Bangumi 看板和写回功能仍需先开启 `Enable write-back to Bangumi`。
- 看板中的章节写回仅支持远端状态为 `do` 或 `collect` 的条目。
- 状态写回支持 `wish`、`do`、`collect`、`on_hold` 和 `dropped`。
- 单集评论暂不支持，因为当前 Bangumi v0 章节收藏接口不返回单集评论文本。

---

### English

This release is a feature and experience update. It adds a Bangumi-style board/grid UI, expands write-back support, and improves sync performance, template data sources, and On Air notes.

#### Added

- Added Bangumi Board for reviewing `status: do` in-progress subjects.
- Added On Air note: generate this week's Bangumi broadcast list and filter your wished/watching anime collections.
- Added single-subject sync by Bangumi URL, subject ID, Chinese title, original title, or title keyword.
- Added template data toggles for detailed subject info, Staff, Characters, and Relations.
- Added `Summary` to the default subject note body.
- Added lightweight `progress_done` frontmatter field for Obsidian Base workflows.
- Added explicit write-back command for pushing the current subject note's episode checklist and collection status to Bangumi.

#### Improved

- Improved sync performance by reducing unnecessary Markdown scans and duplicate API requests.
- Refactored Bangumi API client code for more stable requests, retries, and error handling.
- Incremental sync now recreates locally deleted subject notes.
- Full sync no longer rewrites local files when rendered content is unchanged.
- Reduced sync Notice spam; progress now focuses on start, grouped progress, and final summary.
- Sync failure reports are clearer; missing episode progress is reported explicitly.
- Write-back now verifies remote data after writing, avoiding false success states.
- Write-back APIs now handle empty successful responses from Bangumi correctly.
- Write-back success messages now show the final status instead of unclear boolean text.
- Successful status write-back updates local note frontmatter and moves classified notes to the matching status folder.
- Improved settings UI for the template editor and template variable documentation.
- Updated README / README-en with installation methods, board documentation, screenshots, and write-back notes.

#### Notes

- Bangumi Board and write-back require `Enable write-back to Bangumi`.
- Episode write-back from the board only supports subjects whose remote status is `do` or `collect`.
- Status write-back supports `wish`, `do`, `collect`, `on_hold`, and `dropped`.
- Per-episode comments are not supported because the current Bangumi v0 episode collection API does not return per-episode comment text.

releases.author: kuanphough
releases.description: Sync Bangumi collection and episode progress into notes.

releases.author: kuanphough
releases.description: fix plugin ID is already exists.

releases.author: kuanphough
releases.description:
# Bangumi Sync 0.1.0

Bangumi Sync 的第一个可用版本发布啦。

This is the first usable release of Bangumi Sync.

## 中文

Bangumi Sync 是一个 Obsidian 插件，用于将 Bangumi 收藏、评分、标签、评论和观看进度同步为本地 Markdown 笔记。

### 主要功能

- 同步 Bangumi 书籍、动画、音乐、游戏和三次元条目。
- 支持按收藏状态筛选：想看、已看、进行中、搁置、抛弃。
- 支持增量同步，并在本地条目笔记被误删时自动补回。
- 同步评分、标签、评论、封面、章节 checklist 和轻量进度字段 `progress_done`。
- 支持自定义条目笔记模板和 frontmatter 字段。
- 可选将本次新增或更新的进行中条目写入 Daily Note。
- 同步失败时生成 `Bangumi Sync Report.md`，方便排查问题。
- 提供 token 获取页面、剪贴板填入和 `Test token` 辅助。

### 安装

请下载本 Release 附件中的：

- `manifest.json`
- `main.js`

然后将它们放入你的 Obsidian 库：

```text
<你的库>/.obsidian/plugins/bangumi-sync/
```

重启 Obsidian 或刷新第三方插件列表后，启用 `Bangumi Sync`。

### 注意事项

- 当前使用手动 access token，不支持 OAuth 登录。
- Bangumi v0 章节收藏接口目前不返回用户单集评论，因此暂不支持同步单集评论。
- 插件以桌面端为主，移动端兼容性可能不佳，请谨慎使用。

## English

Bangumi Sync is an Obsidian plugin that syncs Bangumi collections, ratings, tags, comments, and episode progress into local Markdown notes.

### Highlights

- Sync Bangumi books, anime, music, games, and real-life media.
- Filter by collection status: wish, collected, doing, on hold, and dropped.
- Incremental sync with recovery for missing local subject notes.
- Sync rating, tags, comment, cover, episode checklist, and lightweight `progress_done`.
- Customize subject note templates and frontmatter fields.
- Optionally write newly added or updated in-progress subjects to today's Daily Note.
- Generate `Bangumi Sync Report.md` when sync issues occur.
- Includes token page helper, clipboard fill, and `Test token`.

### Installation

Download these files from the Release assets:

- `manifest.json`
- `main.js`

Put them into your Obsidian vault:

```text
<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/bangumi-sync/
```

Then restart Obsidian or reload community plugins, and enable `Bangumi Sync`.

### Notes

- OAuth login is not supported yet; use a manual access token.
- Bangumi's current v0 episode collection endpoint does not return per-episode comment text.
- This plugin is desktop-first. Mobile compatibility may be limited.
